storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish the transition from a terrestrial survival situation to a cosmic inciting incident through a visual pull toward Mars. The sequence must move from the grounded, rocky textures of an Arizona night into a VFX-driven transcendence into deep space.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (experienced fighter, physically fit)

## Required Environments
- rocky_gorge_nightscape (Arizona mountains, starlight)
- deep_space_void

## Continuity Constraints
- Fixed celestial position of Mars in the sky relative to horizon
- Visual texture/particle behavior of the transportation effect

## Beat List
- BT001: Fleeing the cave into the night
- BT002: Gazing at Mars and feeling the pull
- BT003: Whisked away into the void
